args.message: What can you tell me about the maintenance history of this Jeep Wrangler? Has it been in any accidents?

text: What can you tell me about the maintenance history of this Jeep Wrangler? Has it been in any accidents?

speaker: seller

args.message: This Wrangler Sport is a gem! It's been meticulously cared for, and honestly, the maintenance records are solid. As for accidents, nope, not a single one! This baby has a clean bill of health, ready to hit the trails the moment you drive off the lot. You won't find a cleaner 2014 model anywhere, I guarantee it.

speaker: seller

args.message: The overall condition is fantastic, as you can see! We just had our top mechanic give it a once-over, and he gave it a clean bill of health. Runs like a top! No mechanical issues whatsoever. Honestly, it’s in better shape than most Wranglers half its age. You’re looking at a really solid, dependable ride here. I actually saw a similar model with higher mileage go for almost $21,000 just last week at auction!
